prompt: A vibrant outdoor carnival on a sunny day. Colorful game booths with striped awnings display stuffed animal prizes. A large Ferris wheel and a roller coaster dominate the background. Bunting and pennants string between booths. Crowds of visitors walk between attractions. Bright blue sky with scattered clouds. To the right, a cotton candy cart stands near the booths. Beyond the current view to the left, a balloon vendor stands near a ring-toss booth. To the right, a popcorn stand with a pink-and-yellow canopy sits near the booths, with a carousel visible further in the mid-ground with painted horses. Further ahead, a funnel cake truck and a dunk tank are set up near the entrance to the roller coaster. First-person viewer. First-person view with the right hand holding a large rainbow swirl lollipop on a white stick in the lower-right foreground.

scene_adherence.visible_part: A vibrant outdoor carnival takes place on a sunny day. Colorful game booths with striped awnings display stuffed animal prizes. A large Ferris wheel and a roller coaster dominate the background. Bunting and pennants are strung between booths. Crowds of visitors walk between attractions. There is a bright blue sky with scattered clouds. To the right, a cotton candy cart stands near the booths. To the right, a popcorn stand with a pink-and-yellow canopy sits near the booths, and a carousel with painted horses is visible further in the mid-ground.
scene_adherence.offscreen_part: Beyond the current view to the left, a balloon vendor stands near a ring-toss booth. Further ahead, a funnel cake truck and a dunk tank are set up near the entrance to the roller coaster.
